content:
# Crim Model

**Summary**: The Complex Refractive Index Method used to relate dielectric constants of mixtures.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2024-alkhunaizi|Alkhunaizi, 2024]] used the CRIM model to link GPR velocity (VG) to porosity and water saturation.

## Scientific Context

- [[2024-alkhunaizi|Alkhunaizi, 2024]] Used to determine how mineralogy and fluid content affect electromagnetic wave speed.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2024-alkhunaizi|Alkhunaizi, 2024]] Applied as a semi-empirical formula for GPR velocity.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- The CRIM model provided a robust way to calculate VG as a function of phi and SW. ([[2024-alkhunaizi|Alkhunaizi, 2024, p. 35]])
